answer: The DNA sequence ACGTB encodes the gene.
The reverse complement of AACG is AACG.
The coding sequence ACGTACGT is translated.
The RNA sequence ACGT is processed.
The DNA sequence ACGTACGTACGT encodes the gene.
The reverse complement of AACG is CGTT.
The coding sequence ACGACGACG is translated.
The RNA sequence ACGU is processed.
